name: Sodium Bicarbonate
description: An alkaline chemical compound. Serves as a mild anti-pruritic topical paste by neutralizing acidic insect secretions and soothing inflammatory sunburn dermis.
preparation: Mix 3 teaspoons of sodium bicarbonate powder with 1 teaspoon of clean water to form a thick paste. Spread gently over itchy skin lesions or sunburn rashes. Rinse after 10 minutes.
safetyAlert: Extremely safe topically. Do not apply over broken skin or open bleeding ulcers.
interactions: None recorded topically. Enhances systemic bicarbonate levels if ingested in large quantities.
